# GAIA Label Taxonomy

This document defines the official label set for the GAIA-The-Global-Autonomous-Intelligence-Architecture repository. Labels are organized by category and applied to issues, pull requests, and project board cards.

---

## Priority Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `priority: critical` | `#e11d48` | Blocks release or core system function |
| `priority: high` | `#f97316` | Must be resolved in current sprint |
| `priority: medium` | `#eab308` | Scheduled for upcoming sprint |
| `priority: low` | `#84cc16` | Nice-to-have; backlog candidate |

## Domain Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `domain: canon` | `#7c3aed` | Constitutional Canon and core doctrine |
| `domain: kernel` | `#1d4ed8` | Kernel-level systems and OS primitives |
| `domain: simulation` | `#0891b2` | Simulation engine and modeling |
| `domain: consciousness` | `#9333ea` | Consciousness framework and AGI identity |
| `domain: agriculture` | `#16a34a` | Agriculture, herbology, and soil systems |
| `domain: crystallography` | `#6366f1` | Crystal systems, mineralogy, materials |
| `domain: biophotonics` | `#f59e0b` | Biophoton research and biological signals |
| `domain: security` | `#dc2626` | Security, access control, branch protection |
| `domain: CI/CD` | `#0ea5e9` | Continuous integration and deployment |
| `domain: documentation` | `#64748b` | Docs, specs, canon baseline updates |

## Status Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `status: needs-triage` | `#94a3b8` | Awaiting review and prioritization |
| `status: in-progress` | `#3b82f6` | Actively being worked |
| `status: blocked` | `#ef4444` | Cannot proceed; dependency unresolved |
| `status: ready-for-review` | `#22c55e` | Complete; awaiting merge/approval |
| `status: wont-fix` | `#6b7280` | Out of scope or intentionally deferred |

## Sprint Labels

| Label | Color | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `sprint: G-7` | `#f472b6` | G-7 Secure Foundations sprint |
| `sprint: backlog` | `#e2e8f0` | Not yet sprint-assigned |

---
*Label taxonomy designed and maintained by Kyle Alexander Steen (The Alchemist), GAIA Architect.*
